title: attendance — Eloquent observers
description: Four observers enforce every write-time invariant: entitlement checks, cross-tenant defense-in-depth, atomic Pass consumption + refund, state-machine transitions, immutability of session/athlete/enrollment, policy resolution, threshold cascades, and geofence validation. Atomic pass-consumption logic is delegated to AttendanceOrchestrator binding — the observer only knows *whether* to consume; the orchestrator encapsulates *how* (DB transaction + SELECT ... FOR UPDATE + Pass.consume() + event fire).

handles: creating → populate ULID prefix `atd_`
creating → refuse when tenant does NOT hold `attendance_capture` entitlement (returns `ATTENDANCE_CAPTURE_NOT_ENTITLED`)
creating → refuse when session.tenant_id != attendance.tenant_id (cross-tenant defense-in-depth)
creating → refuse when athlete.tenant_id != attendance.tenant_id (cross-tenant defense-in-depth)
creating → refuse when enrollment.tenant_id != attendance.tenant_id (cross-tenant defense-in-depth)
creating → refuse when enrollment.team_id != session.team_id OR enrollment.season_id != session.season_id (returns `ATTENDANCE_ENROLLMENT_MISMATCH`)
creating → refuse when enrollment.status NOT IN ('active', 'confirmed') (returns `ATTENDANCE_ENROLLMENT_INACTIVE`)

creating → refuse when session.status NOT IN ('scheduled', 'confirmed', 'in_progress', 'completed') — cancelled/archived sessions cannot accept new attendance (returns `ATTENDANCE_SESSION_NOT_ATTENDABLE`)
creating → refuse when checked_in_at > session.ends_at + 48h (post-session correction window closed; returns `ATTENDANCE_POST_SESSION_WINDOW_CLOSED`)
creating → refuse when a non-deleted AttendanceRecord already exists for (session, athlete) — enforced by partial unique index (returns `ATTENDANCE_DUPLICATE`)
creating → refuse when an AbsenceRecord already exists for (session, athlete) — mutual exclusion (returns `ATTENDANCE_ABSENCE_ALREADY_RECORDED`)
creating → refuse checked_in_via='self_kiosk' when tenant lacks `attendance_self_kiosk` entitlement
creating → refuse checked_in_via='geofence' when tenant lacks `attendance_geofence` entitlement
creating → refuse checked_in_via='qr_scan' when tenant lacks `attendance_qr_scan` entitlement
creating → refuse checked_in_via='self_kiosk' OR 'qr_scan' AND device_fingerprint_hash IS NULL (returns `ATTENDANCE_FINGERPRINT_REQUIRED`)
creating → refuse checked_in_via='geofence' AND (gps_lat IS NULL OR gps_lng IS NULL) (returns `ATTENDANCE_GPS_REQUIRED`)

creating → refuse when athlete.is_minor AND checked_in_via IN ('self_kiosk', 'geofence', 'qr_scan') AND athlete.consent_snapshot missing device_fingerprint/gps consent (returns `ATTENDANCE_MINOR_CONSENT_MISSING`)
creating → resolve applicable AttendancePolicy via PolicyResolver::resolveFor(session)
creating → validate GPS coordinates when checked_in_via='geofence': gps within session.venue_geofence_radius (delegated to GeofenceValidator; refuses with ATTENDANCE_GEOFENCE_MISMATCH when outside)
creating → compute status from (session.starts_at + policy.grace_period_minutes vs checked_in_at): checked_in_at <= starts_at + grace → 'present'; checked_in_at > starts_at + grace → 'late'
creating → if session.requires_pass: invoke AttendanceOrchestrator::consumePass(enrollment, session, checked_in_at):
→ opens DB transaction (idempotent — joins existing tx when present)
→ SELECT ... FOR UPDATE the earliest unconsumed Pass in the enrollment's active membership's current period
→ refuse with `ATTENDANCE_NO_ACTIVE_PASS` when no Pass available
→ UPDATE passes SET consumed_at, consumed_by_session_id WHERE id=? AND consumed_at IS NULL
→ if 0 rows updated (race condition): rollback + retry once; on second failure fire `ATTENDANCE_PASS_ALREADY_CONSUMED`
→ sets attendance.consumed_pass_id + attendance.membership_id
→ fires PassConsumedViaAttendance in the same transaction as AttendanceRecorded
creating → set checked_out_at IS NULL, deleted_at IS NULL
creating → fire AttendanceRecorded
creating post-commit → if status='late': create LateArrival row (denormalise session_id + athlete_id from attendance) + fire LateArrivalRecorded
creating post-commit → if applicable late_arrival_penalty_type='fractional_pass_consume': update passes.metadata.fractional=0.5 for the consumed pass
updating tenant_id → REFUSE (immutable; returns `ATTENDANCE_TENANT_ID_IMMUTABLE`)
updating session_id → REFUSE (immutable; returns `ATTENDANCE_SESSION_ID_IMMUTABLE`)
updating athlete_id → REFUSE (immutable; returns `ATTENDANCE_ATHLETE_ID_IMMUTABLE`)
updating athlete_enrollment_id → REFUSE (immutable)
updating consumed_pass_id → REFUSE (immutable once set — cancel + re-create attendance to re-attribute)
updating checked_in_at → REFUSE (fingerprint of the check-in event; corrections happen via cancel + re-create)
updating checked_in_via → REFUSE (immutable)
updating status → refuse when now() > session.ends_at + 48h (post-session correction window closed)
updating status transitions: present → left_early / present_with_note; late → left_early / present_with_note; not_yet_checked_in → present / late (only during a coach-verified session-in-progress)
updating status → any invalid transition refused via valid_status rule
updating checked_out_at → allowed once; fires AttendanceCheckedOut. Second update refused (`ATTENDANCE_ALREADY_CHECKED_OUT`)
updating left_early_reason → allowed when checked_out_at set
updating session_notes → coach-only field, allowed on POST /coaches/me/sessions/{session}/attendance/{athlete}/notes
updating any → any → fire AttendanceStatusUpdated when status changed OR AttendanceCheckedOut when checked_out_at newly set
deleting (soft-delete via cancel action) → refuse when now() > session.ends_at + 48h without admin_override permission (returns `ATTENDANCE_POST_SESSION_WINDOW_CLOSED`)

deleting (soft-delete) → refund the consumed Pass via RefundPassAtomicallyOnAttendanceCancelled hook (opens tx; SELECT ... FOR UPDATE the pass; UPDATE passes SET consumed_at=NULL, consumed_by_session_id=NULL, refunded_at=now())
deleting → fire AttendanceCancelled
deleting (hard-delete) → RESTRICT while retention window open (7y post-session or 10y Enterprise); allow only after retention
creating → populate ULID prefix `apo_`
creating → refuse when tenant does NOT hold `attendance_capture` entitlement
creating → refuse membership_plan_id IS NOT NULL when tenant lacks `attendance_advanced_policies` entitlement (returns `ATTENDANCE_ADVANCED_POLICIES_NOT_ENTITLED`)
creating → refuse when grace_period_minutes >= late_after_minutes (returns `ATTENDANCE_POLICY_GRACE_EXCEEDS_LATE`)
creating → refuse when no_show_fee_cents > 0 AND no_show_fee_currency IS NULL (returns `ATTENDANCE_POLICY_CURRENCY_REQUIRED`)
creating → refuse when max_unexcused_absences_per_period < 1 (returns `ATTENDANCE_POLICY_MAX_ABSENCES_INVALID`)
creating → refuse when absence_freeze_period_days < 7 OR > 365 (returns `ATTENDANCE_POLICY_FREEZE_WINDOW_INVALID`)
creating → refuse when auto_excuse_reasons is not a JSON array of known reason strings (validates against data/absence-reason-catalog.json known values)
creating → refuse when a composite active-policy already exists at same (branch_id, membership_plan_id) specificity — enforced by partial unique index (returns `ATTENDANCE_POLICY_DUPLICATE_ACTIVE`)
creating → SOFT-WARN when no_show_fee_cents > 0 AND tenant lacks `attendance_no_show_fees` entitlement (allowed but flagged — fee won't be invoiced until upgrade)
creating → fire AttendancePolicyCreated
updating tenant_id → REFUSE (immutable)
updating branch_id → REFUSE (immutable — changes specificity of the policy; create a new policy instead)
updating membership_plan_id → REFUSE (immutable — same reason)
updating grace_period_minutes / late_after_minutes → re-validate grace < late_after; on success fire AttendancePolicyUpdated + invalidate PolicyResolver cache
updating max_unexcused_absences_per_period → allowed; re-run CheckAbsenceFreezeThresholdJob for all athletes on this policy's scope (may flip prior freeze / unfreeze)
updating is_active false → true → re-check for composite active-policy collision at same specificity; fire AttendancePolicyActivated
updating is_active true → false → fire AttendancePolicyDeactivated
updating any other field → fire AttendancePolicyUpdated
deleting (soft-delete) → refuse when is_active=true (must deactivate first; returns `ATTENDANCE_POLICY_ACTIVE_CANNOT_DELETE`)
deleting (hard-delete) → RESTRICT while any AttendanceRecord/LateArrival references the policy_id
creating → populate ULID prefix `abs_`
creating → refuse when tenant does NOT hold `attendance_capture` entitlement
creating → refuse when session.tenant_id != absence.tenant_id (cross-tenant defense-in-depth)
creating → refuse when athlete.tenant_id != absence.tenant_id
creating → refuse when enrollment.tenant_id != absence.tenant_id
creating → refuse when enrollment.team_id != session.team_id OR enrollment.season_id != session.season_id (returns `ABSENCE_ENROLLMENT_MISMATCH`)
creating → refuse when an AttendanceRecord already exists for (session, athlete) — mutual exclusion (returns `ABSENCE_ATTENDANCE_ALREADY_RECORDED`)
creating → refuse when a non-deleted AbsenceRecord already exists for (session, athlete) — partial unique index (returns `ABSENCE_DUPLICATE`)
creating → auto-set counted_toward_freeze based on status: unexcused=true; excused/no_show_advance_notice_given/vacation/medical/bereavement=false
creating → resolve applicable AttendancePolicy

creating (guardian self-report path) → if reported_at < session.starts_at - policy.advance_notice_threshold (default 24h) AND absence_reason IN policy.auto_excuse_reasons → auto-flip status to 'excused' + set counted_toward_freeze=false + set excused_at=now() + excused_by_user_id=reported_by_user_id
creating → fire AbsenceRecorded
creating post-commit → dispatch CheckAbsenceFreezeThresholdJob for athlete (rolling-window check)
creating post-commit → if status='unexcused' AND policy.no_show_fee_cents > 0 AND tenant holds `attendance_no_show_fees`: dispatch ChargeNoShowFeeJob
updating tenant_id / session_id / athlete_id / athlete_enrollment_id → REFUSE (immutable)
updating status → unexcused ↔ excused only (other transitions require admin override with reason)
updating status → excused → require excused_by_user_id + excused_at set; set counted_toward_freeze=false; re-run CheckAbsenceFreezeThresholdJob (may undo prior freeze); fire AbsenceExcused
updating status → unexcused (reversal) → clear excused_by_user_id + excused_at; set counted_toward_freeze=true; re-run threshold job; fire AbsenceReasonUpdated (with status included)
updating absence_reason OR explanation → fire AbsenceReasonUpdated
deleting (soft-delete) → allowed only by admin with override permission
deleting (hard-delete) → RESTRICT while retention window open (3y post-session)
creating → populate ULID prefix `lat_`
creating → refuse without parent AttendanceRecord.status IN ('late', 'left_early') (returns `LATE_ARRIVAL_NOT_APPLICABLE`)
creating → refuse when attendance_record.tenant_id != late_arrival.tenant_id
creating → denormalise session_id + athlete_id from parent attendance_record (validated to match)
creating → refuse when minutes_late <= 0 (returns `LATE_ARRIVAL_MINUTES_INVALID`)
creating → set policy_id from resolved AttendancePolicy at check-in time (immutable — snapshot)
creating → set penalty_applied from policy.late_arrival_penalty_type at check-in time
creating → fire LateArrivalRecorded
updating attendance_record_id / session_id / athlete_id / policy_id / penalty_applied → REFUSE (immutable)
updating minutes_late → REFUSE (immutable — event timestamp facts)
deleting → cascade with parent AttendanceRecord soft-delete (never deleted independently)
